settings.heading: Trophies & Awards for IT Companies
settings.subheading: Employee recognition, hackathon and annual-award trophies for IT and tech companies — modern crystal and acrylic, logo-engraved, bulk-capable and GST-invoiced. Delivered across India by Meru Trophy.

settings.label: Quick answer
settings.text: Meru Trophy supplies recognition, hackathon and annual awards to IT and tech companies — modern crystal and acrylic pieces, logo-engraved, bulk-capable, GST-invoiced. Trusted by 150+ brands. WhatsApp +91 78922 07252.

settings.heading: Awards built for IT companies
settings.text: Tech companies recognise people year-round — sprint MVPs, hackathon winners, long service, top performers and annual awards. We supply modern, on-brand crystal and acrylic awards with your logo, in co-ordinated sets, with GST invoicing and reliable delivery to IT parks nationwide. Pair with our hackathon kit and awards-night package.

settings.title: Modern, on-brand designs
settings.text: Sleek crystal and acrylic suited to tech.

settings.title: Year-round recognition
settings.text: Spot awards, hackathons, long service, annual awards.

settings.title: Bulk + GST
settings.text: Co-ordinated sets with clean procurement paperwork.

settings.question: Do you do hackathon and recognition awards?
Can you brand with our company logo?
Do you provide GST invoices?
settings.answer: Yes — GST and PO handling for procurement.

settings.question: Do you deliver to our offices nationwide?
settings.answer: Yes — pan-India, plus international for overseas teams.

settings.heading: Need awards for IT companies?
settings.text: Tell us your requirement and date — we'll share relevant past work and a quote, usually within the hour.
